basic_details.organization_name: Ordnance Factory Hospital Vehicle Factory Jabalpur (OFH VFJ)
basic_details.short_information: Ordnance Factory Hospital Vehicle Factory Jabalpur (OFH VFJ) MBBS Doctor Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 04 July 2026 on the official website ddpdoo.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the MBBS Doctor post through the OFH VFJ MBBS Doctor Recruitment 2026.

content_sections.heading: OFH VFJ MBBS Doctor Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.ordnance_factory_hospital_vehicle_factor: MBBS or Equivalent Degree recognized by MCI/NMC

content_sections.heading: OFH VFJ MBBS Doctor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the OFH VFJ Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download OFH VFJ MBBS Doctor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: OFH VFJ MBBS Doctor Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: MBBS or Equivalent Degree recognized by MCI/NMC. Candidate should be registered with Central/State Medical Council.

content_sections.heading: OFH VFJ MBBS Doctor Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: OFH VFJ MBBS Doctor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the OFH VFJ recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Ordnance Factory Hospital Vehicle Factory Jabalpur recruitment is MBBS Doctor. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the MBBS Doctor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the MBBS Doctor post in the Ordnance Factory Hospital Vehicle Factory Jabalpur recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the MBBS Doctor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the MBBS Doctor post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 75,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for the MBBS Doctor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS or an equivalent degree recognized by the Medical Council of India (MCI) or the National Medical Commission (NMC) and be registered with a Central or State Medical Council.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the MBBS Doctor post is scheduled to be held on 27th July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Ordnance Factory Hospital Vehicle Factory Jabalpur located?
faq.answer: The Ordnance Factory Hospital Vehicle Factory Jabalpur is located in Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 482009.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the MBBS Doctor position is Contractual.
